DELETE_args.description: Delete all filters associated with the dataset.

limit.description: Return no more than this many results at once (see resume).

resume.description: Continue returning results from previous call using this token (token should come from the previous call, resume cannot be used with other options).

sort.description: The field that will be used for sorting.

resource_description: This resource represents the collection of "filters" selected for the dataset specified in the URI. A filter is a selection of specific values for each metric in its dataset. These values are "filtered" such that a workload will not be considered for inclusion in the top metrics combinations of a dataset. For instance, a dataset with no filter axes defined will consider all possible metric combinations within its metrics, whereas a dataset with the metric "username" filtered will only consider metric combinations where the username metric matches a configured filter.
